reasoning: IONQ surged 18.3% today on back of two major catalysts: achieving a key photonic interconnect milestone demonstrating networked quantum systems, and selection for DARPA's HARQ program. This creates an ideal initiation moment — concrete technical validation plus government contract momentum provides a defensible thesis window.
title: IonQ: The Quantum Arms Race Has a Commercial Leader — Initiation at $35
angle: Consensus treats quantum computing as a distant 2030+ story and lumps IONQ with vaporware peers. Liria sees IONQ as 2-3 years ahead on trapped-ion commercialization, with the DARPA HARQ selection and photonic interconnect breakthrough validating a networked architecture that competitors cannot replicate near-term. The real edge: enterprise revenue is already scaling while bears focus on GAAP losses.
